title: MRX Five Hard Rules
description: The five hard rules from project-pack/04-compliance/MRX Compliance Review.md §2. Machine-readable mirror.

rules.name: no_guaranteed_value
rules.description: No guaranteed value, no guaranteed offer, no 'we will beat any offer', no 'you will receive $X'.

rules.name: no_certified_appraisal
rules.description: No 'certified appraisal', 'certified appraiser', 'USPAP', 'formal appraisal', 'MRX appraisal report'. In Texas and US appraisal standards, 'appraisal' is a regulated activity.

rules.name: no_legal_or_tax_advice
rules.description: No 'we advise', 'we recommend', 'our legal opinion', 'for tax purposes you should', 'you qualify for the §1031 exchange'. Unlicensed legal/tax practice.

rules.name: no_underwriter_personal_exposure
rules.description: No naming any specific MRX underwriter in marketing copy, no attributing a quote to a named individual, no 'call [name] for your review'.

rules.name: no_unsupported_claims
rules.description: Any statistic, payout figure, 'X% of owners', 'average bonus', customer-count claim, year-in-business claim, or 'trusted by' claim must be backed by a verifiable source.
